positive: A vibrant synthwave illustration of a retro sports car driving through a neon grid landscape at sunset. Palm trees silhouetted against a magenta and cyan sky. 80s vaporwave aesthetic, glitch art, glowing neon outlines, highly saturated colors. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural realism, grayscale, muddy colors
